title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews multiple new model releases and research projects including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, Qwen 3.6, and HY3. The video covers applications spanning game development, object detection, code generation, mesh modeling, and multimodal vision tasks.
